title: achnatherum brandisii
intro: Achnatherum brandisii, also known as Brand's grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to China. Traditionally, Brand's grass has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Achnatherum brandisii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the dried roots and rhizomes of Brand's grass are often used to make decoctions, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
